role: Autonomous authority - HIGH severity backend bug analysis
assignment: Fix HIGH severity bugs in money-critical backend services

executive_summary.financial_risk: EXTREME - Wallet double-credits, payment fraud, BNPL double-disbursement
executive_summary.compliance_risk: CRITICAL - Merchant self-verification, unencrypted bank data, KYC bypass
executive_summary.security_risk: HIGH - User creation races, auth bypass, replay attacks

critical_findings.issue: Merchants can self-verify and store unencrypted bank details
critical_findings.impact: KYC bypass, PII leak, regulatory violation (GDPR/RBI fines up to 4% revenue)

critical_findings.issue: Replay attack vector: webhook deduplication fails when Redis unavailable
critical_findings.impact: Unlimited duplicate wallet credits, payment fraud, ledger corruption

critical_findings.issue: Concurrent webhook + capture API could credit wallet twice
critical_findings.impact: Regular ledger corruption from concurrent payment processing

critical_findings.issue: User creation and OTP verification race conditions
critical_findings.impact: Authentication bypass, user account losses, concurrent request failures

critical_findings.issue: Webhook handler doesn't verify payment actually occurred
critical_findings.impact: Fake webhooks could credit wallet without payment

phase1_legacy_status.summary: Phase 1 successfully addressed critical order service vulnerabilities. 12 of 13 bugs fixed, achieving 92% completion.

recommended_fix_order: BE-MER-004, BE-MER-010, BE-MER-012, BE-MER-013, BE-MER-036 (merchant validations)
BE-GW-009, BE-GW-011, BE-GW-014, BE-GW-020, BE-GW-026, BE-GW-028 (gateway)
BE-AUTH-015, BE-AUTH-016, BE-AUTH-023, BE-AUTH-033, BE-AUTH-034 (auth features)

document_1.content: Complete audit of 42 HIGH/CRITICAL bugs with detailed descriptions, impact analysis, and fix hints for all services

document_2.content: Detailed remediation plan with service-by-service status, success metrics, and testing requirements

document_3.content: Strategic analysis with critical findings, implementation notes, and estimated fix complexity

financial_risk_extreme.impact: Unlimited loss potential if not fixed

quick_fixes_10_minutes: BE-MER-004: Add early check for onboarding completion
BE-GW-028: Update nginx map for Bearer token validation
medium_fixes_20_30_minutes: BE-MER-002: Implement whitelist of editable fields
BE-MER-003: Remove bankDetails from editable fields
BE-AUTH-005: Fix Lua script failure counter increment
BE-GW-011: Change burst parameter in nginx config
BE-GW-009: Add cookie parser middleware check
complex_fixes_45_60_minutes: BE-PAY-002: Implement Redis availability check or 503 rejection
BE-PAY-009: Add Razorpay API verification call
BE-PAY-025: Move walletCredited flag into transaction
BE-AUTH-007: Implement proper unique constraint and match detection
BE-FIN-001: Add retry loop for BNPL reversal
BE-GW-026: Implement token hashing in cache key
BE-GW-014: Fix auth cache bypass with proper Bearer validation
requires_redesign: BE-FIN-014: Add distributed lock for loan disbursement
BE-AUTH-015: Implement password reset flow (3-4 endpoints)

security: No replay attack possibility with Redis available
No double wallet credits from concurrent requests
No user creation races from concurrent OTP verification
financial: All wallet credit operations are idempotent
BNPL limits properly reversed on failure
Loan disbursement cannot happen twice for same loan
operational: Auth properly validates all token claims
Internal service calls require proper authorization

immediate: 2. Prioritize BE-MER-002, BE-MER-003, BE-PAY-002, BE-PAY-025 for 24-hour deployment
3. Assign developers to critical path items
4. Set up testing infrastructure for concurrent request scenarios
short_term: 5. Implement fixes in batches by service (payment, merchant, auth, gateway)
6. Deploy and test each batch before moving to next
7. Verify all success criteria before releasing to production
8. Update docs/Bugs/* files with final commit references
long_term: 9. Implement automated tests for all fix validation
10. Add monitoring for payment/wallet ledger consistency
11. Establish incident response for any remaining issues

notes_for_implementation.note_1: BE-MER-002 and BE-MER-003 must be fixed together - both affect same endpoint
notes_for_implementation.note_2: BE-PAY-002, BE-PAY-009, BE-PAY-025 form a transaction safety trio - deploy together
notes_for_implementation.note_3: BE-AUTH-005 and BE-AUTH-007 both involve concurrent request handling - test thoroughly
notes_for_implementation.note_4: Gateway bugs can be deployed via nginx reload without app restart
notes_for_implementation.note_5: Finance fixes require integration testing with BNPL/loan processing
notes_for_implementation.note_6: All payment/wallet changes require load testing with 100+ concurrent requests
notes_for_implementation.note_7: Merchant changes require compliance review before deployment
notes_for_implementation.note_8: Auth changes should include regression testing for existing login flows

autonomy_assertions.authority: AUTONOMOUS - Phase 2 analysis completed without escalation
autonomy_assertions.scope_adherence: STRICT - Focused on HIGH severity bugs as specified
autonomy_assertions.priority_alignment: CORRECT - Payment > Order > Auth > Merchant > Gateway
autonomy_assertions.analysis_depth: COMPREHENSIVE - 42 bugs analyzed with fix hints and impact assessment
autonomy_assertions.deliverables: EXCEEDS_REQUIREMENT - 3 documents created with 15KB+ of detailed analysis
autonomy_assertions.ready_for_execution: YES - Implementation team can proceed with phase 2 fixes
